_comment: Reviewed model registry. The LLM chain reads these defaults when the corresponding *_MODEL environment variable is not set. The nightly workflow uses only catalogs that can establish safe eligibility, retains OpenRouter's rotating free router, and opens a proposal for operator review when a strictly newer model qualifies. No auto-merge. Hardcoded names in llm.py are emergency fallbacks for a missing or invalid packaged registry.

groq.notes: Llama 3.3 70B is current strong/cheap. When Llama 4 lands on Groq free tier, propose upgrade.

cerebras.notes: Cerebras free tier dropped 70B in early 2026; staying on 8B until they offer larger free models.

mistral.notes: La Plateforme free tier. mistral-large-latest auto-tracks their latest large model.

cloudflare.notes: Workers AI free tier; 8B variant is the most stable free model. Vision models (llava-1.5-7b-hf) available for multimodal.

ollama.notes: Ollama Cloud free plan. Cogito 2.1 is MIT-licensed for commercial use; Ollama states cloud prompts are processed transiently and not used for training.

openrouter.notes: Aggregator tail fallback. The free router rotates among zero-cost models; requests require providers that deny data collection.

huggingface.notes: Inference API; lower latency on smaller models. Last in chain.
